subject: Slender pale figure with upswept pink-red hair holding two dark energy orbs, dark robes with white accents
description: A tall, slender humanoid figure with an angular face and upswept hair stands holding one dark energy orb in each raised hand. The hair is a vivid pink-red color. The figure wears dark robes with white or light-colored trim, giving a wizardly or priestly appearance. The background is a deep purple, creating a sinister atmosphere. The dark energy spheres are the visual focal point, radiating a corrupted or dark magical quality. The overall posture is poised and theatrical, suggesting mastery over dark power rather than brute strength.
foreground: Slender robed figure with upswept pink-red hair, holding dark energy orbs in both hands
background: Deep purple void, dark magical atmosphere
emotion: cold power, theatrical menace, dark mastery
